an4.199:1.2: “Monks, I will teach you craving: the ensnarer that has flowed along, spread out, and caught hold, with which this world is smothered & enveloped like a tangled skein, a knotted ball of string, like matted rushes and reeds, and does not go beyond transmigration, beyond the planes of deprivation, woe, & bad destinations.
an4.199:1.3: Listen well, and I will speak.”
an4.199:1.4: “Yes, lord,” the monks responded to him.
an4.199:2.1: “And which craving is the ensnarer that has flowed along, spread out, and caught hold, with which this world is smothered & enveloped like a tangled skein, a knotted ball of string, like matted rushes and reeds, and does not go beyond transmigration, beyond the planes of deprivation, woe, & bad destinations?
an4.199:2.2: These 18 craving-verbalizations1 dependent on what is internal and 18 craving-verbalizations dependent on what is external.
an4.199:3.1: “And which are the 18 craving-verbalizations dependent on what is internal?
an4.199:3.2: There being ‘I am,’ there comes to be ‘I am here,’ there comes to be ‘I am like this’ … ‘I am otherwise’ … ‘I am bad’ … ‘I am good’ … ‘I might be’ … ‘I might be here’ … ‘I might be like this’ … ‘I might be otherwise’ … ‘May I be’ … ‘May I be here’ … ‘May I be like this’ … ‘May I be otherwise’ … ‘I will be’ … ‘I will be here’ … ‘I will be like this’ … ‘I will be otherwise.’
an4.199:3.3: These are the 18 craving-verbalizations dependent on what is internal.
an4.199:4.1: “And which are the 18 craving-verbalizations dependent on what is external?
an4.199:4.2: There being ‘I am because of this [or: by means of this],’ there comes to be ‘I am here because of this,’ there comes to be ‘I am like this because of this’ … ‘I am otherwise because of this’ … ‘I am bad because of this’ … ‘I am good because of this’ … ‘I might be because of this’ … ‘I might be here because of this’ … ‘I might be like this because of this’ … ‘I might be otherwise because of this’ … ‘May I be because of this’ … ‘May I be here because of this’ … ‘May I be like this because of this’ … ‘May I be otherwise because of this’ … ‘I will be because of this’ … ‘I will be here because of this’ … ‘I will be like this because of this’ … ‘I will be otherwise because of this.’
an4.199:4.3: These are the 18 craving-verbalizations dependent on what is external.
an4.199:5.1: “Thus there are 18 craving-verbalizations dependent on what is internal and 18 craving-verbalizations dependent on what is external.
an4.199:5.3: Thus, with 36 craving-verbalizations of this sort in the past, 36 in the future, and 36 in the present,
an4.199:6.1: “This, monks, is craving: the ensnarer that has flowed along, spread out, and caught hold, with which this world is smothered & enveloped like a tangled skein, a knotted ball of string, like matted rushes and reeds, and does not go beyond transmigration, beyond the planes of deprivation, woe, & bad destinations.”
